description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3-jdk-8 Docker image with two stages: buildntest and release. Add a buildntest_job in the buildntest stage that runs mvn -B clean install and is excluded from tag pipelines. Add a release_job in the release stage that also runs mvn -B clean install, runs only for tag pipelines, and stores the generated JAR files from target/*.jar as artifacts. No caches or services are defined.
